message:
test: add 8 TUI command tests + fix clippy unwrap_err patterns

New TUI state tests cover slash commands:
- /history shows previous inputs with numbered list
- /session displays basic session info and save status
- /settings shows settings summary with resources
- /export writes HTML and reports path
- /share writes temp HTML and reports path
- /resume reports "no sessions found" when empty
- /copy reports clipboard success or unavailable
- /reload sets reloading status message

Also replaces `.await.unwrap_err()` with `.await.err().expect("...")`
in provider_error_paths.rs to satisfy clippy::unwrap_used lint while
maintaining clear test failure messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
